hero.name: Matheo Flores
hero.subtitle: I build websites using modern technology and security best practices, for businesses and individuals.
hero.description: I turn ideas into production-ready digital products.

services.section_title: Choose the kind of website your business needs
services.section_desc: If you are not sure where to start, I can guide you too. The goal is to turn your need into a clear, professional website ready to launch.

featured_projects.section_title: Projects that show how I solve real problems

why_me.item1_desc: I talk with you throughout the whole process. No middlemen, no delays, no surprises.
why_me.item2_desc: I use Next.js, TypeScript and PostgreSQL. Your site can grow without rebuilding from scratch.
why_me.item3_desc: Not just code: design, initial SEO, hosting and launch included in every project.
why_me.item4_desc: I work with clients in Ecuador and worldwide, in Spanish and English, across any timezone.

how_i_work.section_title: From loose idea to published website
how_i_work.step1_title: I clarify what you need to sell
how_i_work.step1_desc: First I understand your business, your customers and the action you want people to take on your website.
how_i_work.step2_title: I define a structure that builds trust
how_i_work.step2_desc: I organize the content, propose the design and prepare an experience made to convince.
how_i_work.step3_desc: I develop a fast, responsive, editable site with SEO foundations from the start.
how_i_work.step4_title: I launch it ready to use
how_i_work.step4_desc: I set up hosting, domain, forms and basic analytics. You leave with a real website, not loose files.

cta_section.title: Let's talk about the website that can sell for you
cta_section.desc: Tell me what you need and I will reply within 24 hours with a clear next step.

footer.tagline: Complete websites for businesses that want to sell better.

projects_page.section_title: See the kind of result I can build for your business
projects_page.section_desc: Every project starts from a specific problem: selling, presenting a brand, attracting customers or managing content without depending on anyone.
projects_page.empty_desc: Try a different combination of category or service.

about.intro_title: I'm Matheo Flores, I'm passionate about technology, and I build complete websites for businesses, companies and individuals
about.intro_desc_1: Technology has always fascinated me: understanding how it works, building things from scratch with code, and watching an idea turn into a real product. That curiosity is what led me to dedicate myself to building websites for businesses, companies and people who need a solid digital presence.
about.intro_desc_2: I'm originally from Quito, Ecuador, but I'm open to working remotely with clients anywhere in the world. I use modern technologies like Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL and Supabase to build products that are fast, secure and built to grow with your business.
about.approach_desc: I do not sell dressed-up templates. I build a custom website with clear messaging, professional design and a technical foundation that can grow with you.
about.stack_desc: The tools I build with every day

contact.section_title: Tell me what website you need and I will show you how to move forward
contact.section_desc: You do not need to have everything figured out. Send me the idea, the type of business and the timeline; I will reply within 24 hours with a clear recommendation.
contact.form_message: Tell me what you want your website to achieve

thank_you.title: Message sent!
thank_you.desc: Thanks for sharing your idea. I review every message personally and will get back to you within 24 hours with a clear path forward.

forgot.title: Really?
forgot.desc: This area is for Matheo only. If you're not Matheo, there's nothing to see here. 😉
